This family includes various types of crops, weeds, and ornamental plants. Hutera pseudoerucastrum is further classified within the genus Hutera, which is a small genus of plants. The species Hutera pseudoerucastrum is a type of succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is closely related to other succulent plants in the Brassicaceae family, such as those in the genus Erucastrum.
